race.comment: WEAPONS HOT (5) won well two back when scoring by 0.9L at this track and trip before stepping out to 1200m last start and never featuring. Back to the scene of the crime now and it's expected that he'll roll forward from out wide. Expecting a much better performance this time around. BUSY FINGERS (6) is looking for a hat-trick after an impressive start to this campaign. Now moves to the Dellar barn and looks a nice gelding on the way up. Will need a touch of luck from the wide barrier, though he's on an upward trajectory and he makes plenty of appeal. AARDVARK (1) showed good pace and went on to score by 5.5 lengths last time out over 1200m at this track. Looks well placed so expect another big run. DEVILS I (7) raced on the speed and lifted to score by 1.3 lengths at today's track and trip last time out to build on a solid first-up effort. No reason he cannot salute again. BUSTER'S GIRL (8) can fire a shot first-up for the new stable.
